pricingOptions.name: Basic Plan
pricingOptions.description: Perfect for beginners who want simple access to gym equipment and basic fitness support.

pricingOptions.name: Standard Plan
pricingOptions.description: Ideal for regular gym members who want training sessions and group fitness classes.

pricingOptions.name: Premium Plan
pricingOptions.description: Best for serious fitness enthusiasts who want unlimited training, classes, and advanced wellness support.
